decks.notes: This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay combined with disruptive elements to control the board and apply pressure on the opponent. It utilizes a mix of powerful creatures like Phelia and Phlage, along with removal spells like Solitude and Prismatic Ending to handle threats. Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional control by limiting the opponent's options, while cards like Wrath of the Skies and Consign to Memory offer additional utility. The deck aims to efficiently deal damage while disrupting the opponent's game plan to secure victory in a Modern 1 vs 1 matchup.

This deck focuses on aggressive plays with a Death and Taxes strategy, utilizing cards like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to pressure opponents. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Teferi, Time Raveler and Prismatic Ending to control the board. Additionally, consigning cards to memory and utilizing cards like Quantum Riddler and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker help maintain card advantage. The deck aims to quickly establish control while applying pressure to opponents, creating a challenging and dynamic playstyle.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a strong board presence with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury. The deck aims to control the battlefield with powerful removal spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment, while also utilizing cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Guide of Souls for additional support. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Arena of Glory provide additional buffs and protection for the creatures, allowing for quick and efficient victories in the fast-paced Modern format.

This deck focuses on putting pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures while disrupting their game plan with taxing effects and removal spells. It aims to control the board and outvalue the opponent by efficiently utilizing its cards and mana resources. By combining aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Galvanic Discharge with disruptive spells like Consign to Memory and Prismatic Ending, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Phage, Titan of Fire's Fury to close out the game quickly.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on a quick and aggressive playstyle, utilizing low-cost creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to deal damage quickly. The deck also includes elements of control with cards like Goblin Bombardment and Elegant Parlor. The inclusion of Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury adds a powerful finisher to the deck. The mana base is optimized for consistency and speed, with cards like Arid Mesa and Sacred Foundry. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional support and can help push for a final victory.

The main idea of this Dimir Control deck is to effectively control the board by countering spells, destroying opponents' lands, and removing threats with efficient removal spells. The deck includes a mix of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to outvalue the opponent and maintain control of the game. Additionally, the deck includes cards that provide graveyard hate and disruption to disrupt opponents' strategies. The goal is to control the game and grind out victories through card advantage and disruption.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly to cheat out powerful Eldrazi creatures such as Ulamog and Emrakul. It utilizes cards like Through the Breach and Kozilek's Command to quickly bring out these massive threats, while also utilizing control elements like Spell Pierce and Force of Negation to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with massive creatures while also having the necessary control elements to handle various threats and maintain board presence.

The deck focuses on quickly cycling through cards to fill up the graveyard with creatures, then casting Living End to return all creatures from the graveyard to the battlefield. It uses cards like Street Wraith and Generous Ent to cycle through the deck efficiently, while also utilizing counterspells like Force of Negation to protect the combo. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a board full of creatures, using cards like Curator of Mysteries and Endurance to provide additional value and disruption. The deck aims to win the game in a single explosive turn through the Living End combo.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Teferi, Time Raveler, while also applying pressure with aggressive creatures like Overlord of the Balemurk and Emperor of Bones. The deck also utilizes flicker effects like Ephemerate and Flickerwisp to gain value and control the battlefield. The inclusion of removal spells like Fatal Push and Prismatic Ending helps to deal with opposing threats. With a mix of disruption, aggression, and value generation, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent in a Modern 1 vs 1 matchup.

The deck focuses on efficiently casting spells to generate a large amount of mana and storm count, with the goal of casting a powerful Grapeshot to deal lethal damage to the opponent. Key cards include Ruby Medallion and Pyretic Ritual to reduce mana costs, Ral, Monsoon Mage for card advantage and damage, Past in Flames to recur spells from the graveyard, and Artist's Talent to copy spells. The deck aims to quickly assemble the combo pieces and win the game in a single explosive turn.

This deck focuses on utilizing low-cost aggressive creatures such as Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly pressure the opponent. Combined with burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment, it aims to deal damage efficiently and maintain board control. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional support with its abilities, while Quantum Riddler and Voice of Victory offer card advantage and protection. The deck also includes a few powerful finishers like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to seal the deal. Overall, the strategy revolves around fast and relentless attacks while disrupting the opponent's game plan.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls. Utilizing burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment, along with the powerful Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. With support from Ranger-Captain of Eos and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah, the deck can also disrupt opponents' strategies and protect its own creatures. The inclusion of cards like Blood Moon and Thraben Charm provide additional versatility and disruption to the deck's game plan.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of artifact creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing cards like Urza's Saga and Mox Opal, the deck can generate mana quickly to deploy threats like Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer. Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke provide board control and disruption, while Tormod's Crypt and Pithing Needle hinder opposing strategies. The goal is to apply early pressure and maintain tempo advantage through efficient plays and resource denial, ultimately securing a quick victory through aggressive tactics and synergistic interactions.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly establish a board presence with efficient creatures and then use cards like Goblin Bombardment and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to deal direct damage to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Voice of Victory to control the battlefield and ensure a steady stream of damage. With cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Seasoned Pyromancer providing additional utility and card advantage, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast-paced, aggressive strategy.

The deck focuses on using ramp cards like Ancient Stirrings and Eldrazi Temple to accelerate into playing large Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, Ulamog, and Devourer of Destiny. Cards like Through the Breach and Sowing Mycospawn are included to cheat these creatures into play quickly. Control elements like Kozilek's Return and Ugin's Labyrinth help to control the board while setting up the Eldrazi finishers. Trinisphere is included to disrupt opponents' spells, and cards like Cavern of Souls and Gemstone Caverns help to ensure that the Eldrazi can be cast consistently.

This deck focuses on aggressive creatures that disrupt the opponent's strategies while also applying pressure on the board. It combines creatures with abilities that can target opponent's cards or disrupt their plans, along with removal spells to maintain control of the game. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of disruption and damage, taking advantage of strong synergies between its creatures and spells to outmaneuver the opponent and secure victory through a combination of strategy and aggression.
